title: ANT per-session agent state
description:
Schema for the JSON file written by per-CLI hook plugins to advertise live session state. Read by ANT's agent-state-reader to populate AgentStatus.

Written by hook scripts on lifecycle events (SessionStart / UserPromptSubmit / PreToolUse / PostToolUse / Stop / Notification / PermissionRequest equivalents in each CLI).

Location: $HOME/.ant/state/<cli>/<session_id>.json (preferred), or legacy per-CLI dirs (e.g. $HOME/.claude/state/<session_id>.json for back-compat).

state.description: Canonical agent lifecycle state. Available=fresh session; Working=turn in progress; Menu=structured menu blocking (AskUserQuestion/ExitPlanMode); Permission=tool permission blocking; Response needed=turn ended with a question; Waiting=turn ended without a question.

menu_kind.description: When state is Menu, which structured menu is open. Null otherwise.

session_start.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session began. Captured at SessionStart hook.

last_user_ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last user-typed message. Captured at UserPromptSubmit.

last_resp_ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last assistant turn end. Captured at Stop.

last_edit_ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last tool invocation. Captured at PreToolUse.

cwd.description: Current working directory of the session. Used by ANT to disambiguate sessions.

project_dir.description: The directory the CLI was launched from (may differ from cwd when the user has cd'd).

permission_mode.description: Optional human-readable permission mode label, e.g. 'bypass permissions on' / 'auto-approve writes'.

remote_control_active.description: True when a remote-control protocol (Claude Code's Remote Control, etc.) is active for the session.
